description: Apply all content and branding changes to index.html and terms-and-conditions.html for Petrus Jakub identity.
steps: In stella/index.html - Replace all instances of 'Stella Elsya' with 'Petrus Jakub'
In stella/index.html - Replace 'Senior Manulife Agent' with 'Partner Bisnis Manulife' everywhere (title, meta tags, nav, figcaption, quote cite, etc.)
In stella/index.html - Replace all WhatsApp numbers: change '6282255291890' to '6287781896087' in all wa.me links and api.whatsapp.com links
In stella/index.html - Change all WA message text parameters in links to use 'Pak Petrus saya tertarik asuransi' (URL encoded: Pak%20Petrus%20saya%20tertarik%20asuransi)
In stella/index.html - Change brand-mark letter from 'S' to 'P'

In stella/index.html - Replace profile image references: change the source srcset from 'public/profile-pic-480.webp 480w, public/profile-pic-960.webp 960w' to just 'public/PJ1.jpg', change to 'public/PJ1.jpg', remove the webp tag since PJ1.jpg is a JPEG, update the preload in similarly
In stella/index.html - Update og:image and twitter:image meta to reference 'public/PJ1.jpg' instead of 'public/profile-pic.jpg'
In stella/index.html - Update og:image:type to 'image/jpeg' (already is, just confirm)
In stella/index.html - Update schema.org JSON-LD: change name, telephone (+6287781896087), areaServed to 'Jakarta, Indonesia', image URL
In stella/index.html - Hero section: change 'Selama 19 tahun' to 'Selama 10 tahun lebih di industri asuransi' in hero-subtitle paragraph
In stella/index.html - Trust section: change feature-card h3 '19 Tahun Pengalaman' to '10 Tahun Lebih Pengalaman' and update the paragraph to mention '10 tahun lebih' instead of 'dua dekade'
In stella/index.html - Trust section quote cite: update to 'Petrus Jakub, Partner Bisnis Manulife'
In stella/index.html - Achievement section MDRT card: remove the entire year-list div (containing 2012-2018 spans) from the MDRT recognition-card
In stella/index.html - Achievement section: delete the entire COT recognition-card article (the one with class 'recognition-card highlight')

In stella/index.html - Agent's Pick section: change MUHC product card link from wa.me to 'https://haipetrus.netlify.app/' (keep the link text 'Tanya lebih lanjut gratis' but href becomes the netlify URL)
In stella/index.html - Products section: change the MiUltimate HealthCare product card's button link from wa.me to 'https://haipetrus.netlify.app/'
In stella/index.html - Footer: change '19 tahun mengawal' to '10 tahun lebih mengawal'
In stella/index.html - Footer address: change tel link to '+6287781896087', format display as '+62 877-8189-6087', change WhatsApp display similarly
In stella/index.html - Footer address: change 'Kalimantan Barat, Indonesia' to 'Jakarta, Indonesia'
In stella/index.html - Footer bottom: remove '| Certified Financial Planner' text
In stella/index.html - Footer bottom: change 'Copyright 2026 Stella Elsya' to 'Copyright 2026 Petrus Jakub'
In stella/index.html - Update canonical URL and og:url if referencing stellaelsya.com (can change to a generic or leave as-is since we don't have a new domain - just update the text references)
In stella/index.html - Update meta keywords to reference 'Petrus Jakub' instead of 'Stella Elsya'
In stella/index.html - Update img alt text from 'Stella Elsya, Senior Manulife Agent' to 'Petrus Jakub, Partner Bisnis Manulife'
In stella/index.html - Update twitter:image:alt to 'Petrus Jakub, Partner Bisnis Manulife'
In stella/terms-and-conditions.html - Replace all 'Stella Elsya' with 'Petrus Jakub'
In stella/terms-and-conditions.html - Replace 'Senior Manulife Agent' with 'Partner Bisnis Manulife'
In stella/terms-and-conditions.html - Change brand-mark from 'S' to 'P'
In stella/terms-and-conditions.html - Update page title to 'Terms & Conditions | Petrus Jakub'
In stella/script.js - Update all WhatsApp URLs: change '6282255291890' to '6287781896087' in all qnaProducts wa links
In stella/script.js - Update all WA message text in qnaProducts to use 'Pak Petrus saya tertarik asuransi' (URL encoded)
acceptance_criteria: No instance of 'Stella Elsya' remains in any HTML or JS file
No instance of 'Senior Manulife Agent' remains in any HTML or JS file
No instance of '6282255291890' remains in any HTML or JS file
No instance of 'Certified Financial Planner' remains
No instance of '19 tahun' or '19 Tahun' remains
COT recognition card is completely removed from index.html
MDRT card has no year-list div
verification: Run: grep -rn 'Stella Elsya' stella/ (should return nothing)
Run: grep -rn 'Kalimantan Barat' stella/ (should return nothing)
Run: grep -rn 'Certified Financial Planner' stella/ (should return nothing)
Run: grep -rn 'Senior Manulife Agent' stella/ (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'PJ1.jpg' stella/index.html (should show profile image references)
Run: grep -n 'haipetrus.netlify.app' stella/index.html (should show MUHC links)
